column1: # IMPORTANT: the linux partition MUST start at 0x120000.
# The jcmvbkbc esp-hosted network_adapter firmware reports:
# 0x42120000 is the XIP cache address for flash offset 0x120000
# Both this file AND sdkconfig.pandatouch.defaults must agree on the
# layout so that idf.py flash and parttool.py use the same offsets.
# Partition name   Type    SubType   Offset    Size      Notes
# nvs              data    nvs       0x009000  0x004000  WiFi/NVS KV store
# bootloader_app   app     factory   0x010000  0x110000  esp-hosted Linux loader
